name: Crock Pot Hamburger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the beef into the slow-cooking pot.
2. Add pepper, oregano, basil, seasoned salt, and dry onion soup mix to the pot.
3. Stir in 3 cups boiling water, tomato sauce, and soy sauce.
4. Add celery and carrots to the mixture.
5. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
6. Turn the control to high.
7. Add cooked macaroni and Parmesan cheese.
8. Cover and cook on high for 10-15 minutes. Other vegetables may be added if desired.
